```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "tests/test_http2.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/2 stream extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE, HTTP2Handler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + b\"\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x04\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_parse_minimal():\r\n    \"\"\"Minimal HTTP/2: preface + SETTINGS + HEADERS request + HEADERS response (synthetic).\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        from hyperframe.frame import Frame, HeadersFrame\r\n\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        req_headers = encoder.encode(\r\n            [\r\n                (\":method\", \"GET\"),\r\n                (\":path\", \"/\"),\r\n                (\":scheme\", \"https\"),\r\n                (\":authority\", \"example.com\"),\r\n            ]\r\n        )\r\n        # Build minimal c2s: preface + SETTINGS(0) + HEADERS(stream 1)\r\n        settings = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        L = len(req_headers)\r\n        hdr_frame = bytes([L >> 16 & 0xFF, L >> 8 & 0xFF, L & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + req_headers\r\n        c2s = HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + settings + hdr_frame\r\n        # Server: HEADERS stream 1 :status 200\r\n        enc2 = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        resp_headers = enc2.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        L2 = len(resp_headers)\r\n        s2c = bytes([L2 >> 16 & 0xFF, L2 >> 8 & 0xFF, L2 & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + resp_headers\r\n        h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n        txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n        assert len(txns) >= 1\r\n        t = txns[0]\r\n        assert t.stream_id == 1\r\n        assert t.flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n        assert t.txn_id == compute_txn_id_http2(\"flow1\", 1)\r\n        assert t.method == \"GET\"\r\n        assert t.path == \"/\"\r\n        assert t.status_code == 200\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        pytest.skip(\"h2/hpack/hyperframe required\")\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:24:08 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###

http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "tests/test_http2.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/2 stream extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE, HTTP2Handler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + b\"\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x04\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\\x00\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http2_parse_minimal():\r\n    \"\"\"Minimal HTTP/2: preface + SETTINGS + HEADERS request + HEADERS response (synthetic).\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        from hyperframe.frame import Frame, HeadersFrame\r\n\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        req_headers = encoder.encode(\r\n            [\r\n                (\":method\", \"GET\"),\r\n                (\":path\", \"/\"),\r\n                (\":scheme\", \"https\"),\r\n                (\":authority\", \"example.com\"),\r\n            ]\r\n        )\r\n        # Build minimal c2s: preface + SETTINGS(0) + HEADERS(stream 1)\r\n        settings = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        L = len(req_headers)\r\n        hdr_frame = bytes([L >> 16 & 0xFF, L >> 8 & 0xFF, L & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + req_headers\r\n        c2s = HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE + settings + hdr_frame\r\n        # Server: HEADERS stream 1 :status 200\r\n        enc2 = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        resp_headers = enc2.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        L2 = len(resp_headers)\r\n        s2c = bytes([L2 >> 16 & 0xFF, L2 >> 8 & 0xFF, L2 & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + resp_headers\r\n        h = HTTP2Handler()\r\n        txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n        assert len(txns) >= 1\r\n        t = txns[0]\r\n        assert t.stream_id == 1\r\n        assert t.flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n        assert t.txn_id == compute_txn_id_http2(\"flow1\", 1)\r\n        assert t.method == \"GET\"\r\n        assert t.path == \"/\"\r\n        assert t.status_code == 200\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        pytest.skip(\"h2/hpack/hyperframe required\")\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
